title: Moultonianthus leembruggianus

The Gesneriaceae family is a member of the order Lamiales, which includes many other types of flowering plants. The Lamiales order is also part of the larger clade Asterids, a group of flowering plants that also includes families such as Lamiaceae and Scrophulariaceae.
